IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: DEDICATED TO PROTECTING VULNERABLE CHILDREN THROUGH PREVENTION, TREATMENT, AND ADVOCACY.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THIS YEAR, ALL FOR KIDS PROVIDED 50,000 AT-RISK CHILDREN AND PARENTS LIVING IN LOS ANGELES AND ORANGE COUNTIES WITH SERVICES THAT INCLUDE SCHOOL READINESS, PARENTING CLASSES, FAMILY RESOURCE CENTERS, SUPPORT GROUPS, MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING, FOSTER CARE, FOSTER-ADOPTION AND MORE. THE AGENCY ALSO LEADS MCI NETWORK, A SOCIAL INNOVATIONS LAB WITH A MODEL FOR PREVENTION THAT IS WORKING TO GO BEYOND DIRECT SERVICES TO CREATE LARGE-SCALE COMMUNITY CHANGE. ALL FOR KIDS IS NATIONALLY ACCREDITED THROUGH THE NATIONAL COUNCIL ON ACCREDITATION AND IS AN AMERICAN TRAINING & DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATION GLOBAL BEST AWARD WINNER FOR ITS VIRTUAL EMPLOYEE DEVELOPMENT AND TRAINING PROGRAM FOR 2020 AND 2021.
IRS990.Desc: CHILD ABUSE PREVENTION PROGRAMS: ALL FOR KIDS IS AN INNOVATIVE LEADER IN THE FIELD OF CHILD ABUSE PREVENTION. ALL FOR KIDS FOCUSES OUR PREVENTION EFFORTS ON FOUR INTERLOCKING GOALS KNOWN TO BOOST THE SUCCESS OF FAMILIES AND COMMUNITIES NURTURING PARENTING, SCHOOL READINESS, FAMILY RESOURCE CENTERS, HOME VISITING PROGRAMS AND PARENTING CLASSES. ALL FOR KIDS IS ONE OF THE LARGEST INVESTORS IN CHILD ABUSE PREVENTION IN THE COUNTRY AND IS DEVELOPING A NATIONAL MODEL TO TRANSFORM AN ENTIRE AT-RISK COMMUNITY IN LOS ANGELES THROUGH ITS MAGNOLIA COMMUNITY INITIATIVE.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ARE PROVIDED TO CHILDREN WHO HAVE BEEN ABUSED AND TO FAMILIES IN NEED OF PROFESSIONAL HELP TO GET THEIR LIVES BACK ON TRACK. EACH YEAR, ALL FOR KIDS PROVIDES MORE THAN 94,290 HOURS OF MENTAL HEALTH THERAPY AND COUNSELING TO CHILDREN AND PARENTS IN NEED. ONE OF OUR SPECIALTIES IS HELPING FOSTER AND ADOPTIVE CHILDREN WITH MENTAL DISORDERS REDUCE THEIR DEPRESSION, ANXIETY, ANGER AND/OR WITHDRAWAL THAT FREQUENTLY ACCOMPANY ABUSE. ALL FOR KIDS BELIEVES THIS CRITICAL THERAPY HELPS TO BREAK THE CYCLE OF ABUSE THAT IS OFTEN ONGOING AS THESE PARTICULAR CHILDREN BECOME ADULTS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: FOSTER CARE/ADOPTIONS: HEALING CHILDREN AND FAMILIES FROM THE TRAGEDY OF ABUSE HAS BEEN A FOCUS OF ALL FOR KIDS SINCE ITS FOUNDING. ALL FOR KIDS DOES THIS THROUGH FOSTER CARE FAMILIES. FOR THOSE FOSTER AND ADOPTIVE FAMILIES WHO NEED FURTHER HELP, ALL FOR KIDS PROVIDE THERAPY, MENTORING AND SUPPORT GROUPS THROUGH OUR ADOPTION PROMOTION AND SUPPORT SERVICES. ALL FOR KIDS IS ONE OF THE LARGEST PRIVATE, NONPROFIT ADOPTION AGENCIES IN CALIFORNIA AND ONE OF THE FEW THAT IS NATIONALLY ACCREDITED BY THE CHILD WELFARE LEAGUE OF AMERICA.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: TO MAXIMIZE INCOME TO FUND ALL FOR KIDS ORGANIZATION PROGRAM ACTIVITIES WHILE GENERATING INCOME AND PRESERVING THE FUND'S CAPITAL. TO ATTAIN A TOTAL RETURN THAT PROVIDES FOR PRESERVATION OF PRINCIPAL AND LONG TERM GROWTH IN REAL TERMS.

ALL FOR KIDS ORGANIZATION RECOGNIZES THE IMPACT OF TAX POSITIONS IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS IF THAT POSITION IS MORE LIKELY THAN NOT TO BE SUSTAINED ON AUDIT, BASED ON THE TECHNICAL MERITS OF THE POSITION. DURING THE YEAR ENDED JUNE 30, 2024, THE ORGANIZATION PERFORMED AN EVALUATION OF UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS AND DID NOT NOTE ANY MATTERS THAT WOULD REQUIRE RECOGNITION IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS OR WHICH MIGHT HAVE AN EFFECT ON ITS TAX-EXEMPT STATUS.

THE ORGANIZATION MAINTAINS RECORDS TO SUBSTANTIATE THE AMOUNT OF ASSISTANCE AND THE SELECTION CRITERIA USED TO AWARD THE ASSISTANCE. THE FOSTER CARE FAMILY IS ALREADY PART OF THE PROGRAM TRACKING AND GETS THE MONTHLY STIPEND.
NONCASH CONTRIBUTIONS ARE LISTED BY TOTAL NUMBER OF CONTRIBUTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 1A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ANY EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE FORMED BY THE BOARD SHALL EXERCISE ANY OF THE POWERS AND AUTHORITY OF THE BOARD IN MANAGEMENT OF THE BUSINESS AFFAIRS OF THE CORPORATION TO THE EXTENT DELEGATED BY THE BOARD, SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING LIMITATIONS: (A) FILL VACANCIES ON THE BOARD OR IN ANY COMMITTEE WHICH HAS THE AUTHORITY OF THE BOARD; (B) FIX COMPENSATION OF THE DIRECTORS FOR SERVING ON THE BOARD OR ON ANY COMMITTEE; (C) AMEND OR REPEAL BYLAWS OR ADOPT NEW BYLAWS; (D) AMEND OR REPEAL ANY RESOLUTION OF THE BOARD WHICH BY ITS EXPRESS TERMS IS NOT SO AMENDABLE OR REPEALABLE; (E) APPOINT ANY OTHER COMMITTEES OR THE MEMBERS OF THESE COMMITTEES; (F) DESIGNATE OR APPOINT ANY LIFE MEMBERS OR ESTABLISH THE QUALIFICATIONS, RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF LIFE MEMBERS; (G) EXPEND CORPORATE FUNDS TO SUPPORT A NOMINEE FOR DIRECTOR AFTER MORE PERSONS HAVE BEEN NOMINATED THAN CAN BE ELECTED; OR (H) APPROVE ANY TRANSACTION (I) BETWEEN THE CORPORATION AND ONE OR MORE OF ITS DIRECTORS OR (II) BETWEEN THE CORPORATION AND ANY ENTITY IN WHICH ONE OR MORE OF ITS DIRECTORS HAVE A MATERIAL FINANCIAL INTEREST. THE CHAIRPERSON SHALL BE APPOINTED AS A MEMBER OF AND ACT AS CHAIRPERSON OF ANY EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE. THE BOARD, BY RESOLUTION APPROVED BY A MAJORITY OF THE DIRECTORS THEN IN OFFICE, SHALL HAVE THE SOLE POWER TO APPOINT MEMBERS OF THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE. THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE IS COMPRISED BY THE FOLLOWING BOARD MEMBERS: MATT WILSON, CHAIR AMANDA RUCH, VICE CHAIR RICKI RAMOS, VICE CHAIR PAUL CHEN, VICE CHAIR JAMES ST ALBIN, VICE CHAIR HOPE WINTER, VICE CHAIR MICHAEL TRAYLOR, VICE CHAIR CHRIS JACKSON, VICE CHAIR

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 4
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: IN ALIGNMENT WITH THE 2021-2025 STRATEGIC PLAN, CHILDREN'S BUREAU EXPLORED A NAME CHANGE TO OVERCOME SEVERAL CHALLENGES AND BETTER REFLECT ITS BRAND STRATEGY. SINCE 1904, THE AGENCY HAS HAD FIVE NAMES, AND "CHILDREN'S BUREAU" HAS PRESENTED OBSTACLES, INCLUDING CONFUSION WITH A SIMILARLY NAMED GOVERNMENT OFFICE, LACK OF CLARITY AROUND SERVICES, AND LIMITED ALIGNMENT WITH CURRENT STRATEGIC GOALS. IN OCTOBER 2023, THE BOARD APPROVED THE NAME CHANGE TO ALL FOR KIDS AND BEGAN IMPLEMENTING IT IN MARCH 2024 AS "CHILDREN'S BUREAU OF SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA DBA ALL FOR KIDS." IN OCTOBER 2024, THE AGENCY APPLIED TO THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA TO LEGALLY CHANGE THE BUSINESS NAME TO ALL FOR KIDS ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE DRAFT IS DISTRIBUTED TO ALL BOARD MEMBERS FOR REVIEW, PRIOR TO BEING FILED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PRIOR TO ENTERING INTO A PROPOSED FINANCIAL TRANSACTION WITH A DIRECTOR OR OFFICER, OR A BUSINESS CONTROLLED BY A DIRECTOR OR OFFICER, THE ORGANIZATION REFERS TO AND COMPLIES WITH THE ORGANIZATION'S CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY. THE POLICY DOCUMENT IS SENT ANNUALLY VIA EMAIL TO ALL BOARD MEMBERS. THIS INFORMATION IS COMPILED AND SUBSEQUENTLY REVIEWED BY THE CEO.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE REVIEWS AND DETERMINES THE COMPENSATION OF THE PRESIDENT & CEO, INDEPENDENTLY WITHOUT THE PARTICIPATION OF INTERESTED PARTIES. THE RECOMMENDATION OF THE COMMITTEE IS THEN PRESENTED TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR RATIFICATION. FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15B: THE PRESIDENT & CEO IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE EVALUATES COMPENSATION FOR THE CFO AND OTHER KEY EMPLOYEES WITHIN THE ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND FINANCIAL INFORMATION IS ALWAYS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

OTHER PROFESSIONAL FEES: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 1,782,894. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 191,555. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 14,028. TOTAL EXPENSES 1,988,477. CONSULTING: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 3,183,510. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 342,037. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 25,049. TOTAL EXPENSES 3,550,596.
NO PROCESSES HAVE CHANGED FROM THE PRIOR YEAR.

IdRelatedTaxExemptOrgGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: PROVIDE FINANCIAL SUPPORT EXCLUSIVELY TO ALL FOR KIDS ORGANIZATION
LEASE FACILITIES TO ALL FOR KIDS ORGANIZATION
